hero.headline: When your septic tank's full, *we're already on the way*
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, live person answers, reasonable rates — that's how Valdosta gets unstuck

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Septic, drains, and water flow
services_section.subheading: Real trucks, real equipment, real results

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Full tank pumping and inspection. We check everything while we're here to keep you flowing smooth.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, main lines. When water won't go down, we make it move.

services.title: Backup Prevention
services.description: Routine maintenance schedules to prevent overflows before they happen. Set it and forget it.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: Overflowing toilets, backed-up tubs. We show up same day, even Sundays.

about.heading: Live person answers, same day service
about.body: We're the Valdosta septic team that shows up when we say we will. No call centers, no runaround — just honest service at fair rates.

reviews.name: Missy S.
reviews.text: Septic tank was full and N.J came out within hours on a Sunday! Very professional, answered all questions, rates are very reasonable.

reviews.name: Candace W.
reviews.text: Called at 8:30am, Mickey was out in just over an hour! Pleasant and explained everything he did to fix the issues.

reviews.name: Jessica S.
reviews.text: Toilets overflowing, water backing up in tub. Within minutes of arrival, everything was draining and flushing perfectly!

cta.heading: Ready to get things flowing again?
cta.body: Call now for same-day service. Live person answers, fair rates, no surprises.
